sections.title: If the animated armour despawns after 5 minutes of not being killed

lines.speaker: Shanomi
lines.text: Greetings [player name]. Welcome you are in the test of combat.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: My armour disappeared!

lines.speaker: Shanomi
lines.text: Correct you are. Not killed it was. Collected your armour I did.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Excellent, may I have it so I can try the machine again?

lines.speaker: Shanomi
lines.text: Space you will need in your pack.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay, I'll go make some room in my inventory and come back.

lines.speaker: Shanomi
lines.text: It is as you say.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks!

lines.speaker: Shanomi
lines.text: Greetings [player name]. Welcome you are in the test of combat.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What do I do here?

lines.speaker: Shanomi
lines.text: A spare suit of plate armour need you will. Full helm, plate leggings and platebody yes? Placing it in the centre of the magical machines you will be doing. KA- POOF! The armour, it attacks most furiously as if

lines.speaker: Shanomi
lines.text: alive! Kill it you must, yes.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So I use a full set of plate armour on the centre plate of the machines and it will animate it? Then I have to kill my own armour... how bizarre!

lines.speaker: Shanomi
lines.text: Yes. It is as you are saying. For this earn tokens you will. Also gain experience in combat you will. Trained long and hard here have I.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You're not from around here are you...?

lines.speaker: Shanomi
lines.text: It is as you say.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So will I lose my armour?

lines.speaker: Shanomi
lines.text: Lose armour you will if damaged too much it becomes. Rare this is, but still possible. If kill you the armour does, also lose armour you will.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So, occasionally I might lose a bit because it's being bashed about and I'll obviously lose it if I die... that it?

lines.speaker: Shanomi
lines.text: It is as you say.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Where do the machines come from?

lines.speaker: Shanomi
lines.text: Make them I did, with magics.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Magic, in the Warrior's Guild?

lines.speaker: Shanomi
lines.text: A skilled warrior also am I. Harrallak mistakes does not make. Potential in my invention he sees and opportunity grasps.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I see, so you made the magical machines and Harrallak saw how they could be used in the guild to train warrior's combat... interesting. Harrallak certainly is an intelligent guy.

lines.speaker: Shanomi
lines.text: It is as you say.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: May I claim my tokens please?

lines.speaker: Shanomi
lines.text: No space you have carry them for.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Right, I need space in my pack for them. I'll be back!

lines.speaker: Shanomi
lines.text: Yes yes! Earned you have [number] token[s]!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks!

lines.speaker: Shanomi
lines.text: No tokens earned have you. In training activities participate you must.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay, I'll go see what I can find to do around here to earn some tokens.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Bye!

lines.speaker: Shanomi
lines.text: Health be with you travelling.

sections.title: Using any item that isn't a standard metal full helm, platebody, or platelegs on the animator

lines.speaker: Shanomi
lines.text: Plain full plate armour in those machines only you may use, of appropriate materials. When other items used, bad things happen, yes!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay, so I can only use plain full plate armour of appropriate materials, no trimmed armour or unusual kit?

lines.speaker: Shanomi
lines.text: It is as you say.

lines.speaker: Shanomi
lines.text: Those things which cannot be seen, perceive them.

lines.speaker: Shanomi
lines.text: Do nothing which is of no use.

lines.speaker: Shanomi
lines.text: Think not dishonestly.

lines.speaker: Shanomi
lines.text: The Way in training is.

lines.speaker: Shanomi
lines.text: Gain and loss between you must distinguish.

lines.speaker: Shanomi
lines.text: Trifles pay attention even to.

lines.speaker: Shanomi
lines.text: Way of the warrior this is.

lines.speaker: Shanomi
lines.text: Acquainted with every art become.

lines.speaker: Shanomi
lines.text: Ways of all professions know you.

lines.speaker: Shanomi
lines.text: Judgment and understanding for everything develop you must.
